title: Civic Slot Public-Service Landing Page
topic: Build an accessible public-service landing page for appointment booking called Civic Slot.
prompt: Build an accessible public-service landing page for Civic Slot, an appointment booking service for local government offices. Prioritize clarity, trust, readable forms, visible focus states, and plain language. Include a booking-oriented hero, service categories, availability explanation, accessibility commitments, and a simple contact or support section. Keep it static and responsive.
successCriteria: The page uses semantic landmarks and visible focus styles.
Copy is plain, public-service appropriate, and avoids marketing exaggeration.
Form controls or booking controls have labels, helper text, and sufficient contrast.
The page renders cleanly on mobile and desktop.
